name: com.bidscube.sdk
description: Bidscube advertising for Unity — two integration paths: (1) Direct SDK — C# APIs for banner, fullscreen video/VAST, native, and interstitials against your SSP. (2) AppLovin MAX — Bidscube as a custom mediated network; Android ships the MAX adapter AAR; Unity Editor injects com.bidscube:bidscube-sdk from Maven Central as @aar (pinned in Constants.NativeAndroidBidscubeSdkVersion), AppLovin SDK 13.x, Media3, IMA, UMP, Glide, Material; core library desugaring is not injected by default (BidscubeAndroidGradlePostprocessor.NoDesugarMode). iOS uses bundled WebView plugins and optional CocoaPods BidscubeSDKAppLovin. Version 1.0.4 removes the bundled core Android AAR in favour of Maven-only resolution (valid UPM semver; use v1.0.4 Git tag).

samples.description: Example scenes and scripts demonstrating the Bidscube Unity SDK.
